readings.summary: Paul and Barnabas are expelled from Antioch.

readings.citation:
Ps 100:1-2, 3, 5, R. v.3c
We are his people, the sheep of his flock.
readings.antiphon:
Ps 100:1-2, 3, 5, R. v.3c
We are his people, the sheep of his flock.

readings.summary: John sees people of every race before the throne.

I am the good shepherd, says the Lord;
I know my sheep, and mine know me.

antiphons.text:
The merciful love of the Lord fills the earth;
by the word of the Lord the heavens were made, alleluia.

The Good Shepherd has risen,
who laid down his life for his sheep
and willingly died for his flock, alleluia.
